raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The High-Speed Rail project is over budget and behind schedule.",
    "There is an immediate $7 billion funding shortfall for completing the $35.2 billion Merced-to-Bakersfield segment of the High-Speed Rail.",
    "The High-Speed Rail Authority has not put forth a plan to bridge the funding gap.",
    "The High-Speed Rail Authority has not completed a risk analysis for its plan to complete the Merced-to-Bakersfield segment.",
    "The projected cost of the High-Speed Rail has increased from $34 billion to $128 billion.",
    "No track has been laid for the High-Speed Rail project despite $13.7 billion spent over 17 years."
```
